class.name: AutoworkConfig
class.experimental: Some methods may not be implemented and may be changed in future versions.
class.brief_description: Handles configuration options for the Autowork test framework.
class.description:
The AutoworkConfig class is responsible for managing configuration options used by the Autowork testing framework.
It provides functionality to load, modify, apply, and persist configuration settings. These options can control aspects such as test discovery, filtering, logging behavior, and execution settings.
Configurations can be defined programmatically using dictionaries or loaded from external files, making it easier to share and reuse test setups across projects.

method.name: apply_options
method.description: Applies the stored configuration options to the given [param runner].

method.name: get_options
method.description: Returns the currently stored configuration options.

method.name: load_options
method.description: Loads configuration options from a file.

method.name: write_options
method.description: Writes the current configuration options to a file.
